title: philadelphus lewisii subsp. californicus
intro: Philadelphus lewisii subsp. californicus, also known as the California mock orange, is a fragrant flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, have been used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support immune function.
